title: California Avocado Toast
description: Fresh and healthy avocado toast topped with cherry tomatoes and feta cheese. Perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch!
keywords: avocado toast, breakfast, healthy, quick, vegetarian
instructions: Toast the bread slices in a toaster or on a griddle until golden brown and crispy on both sides.
While bread is toasting, cut avocados in half, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl.
Mash avocados with a fork, adding lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Mash to desired consistency - chunky or smooth.
Spread the mashed avocado generously on each toast slice, making sure to reach the edges.
Top each toast with halved cherry tomatoes and crumbled feta cheese if using.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with red pepper flakes for a little kick.
Serve immediately while toast is still warm and crispy. Enjoy!
overview: For added flavor, try using a drizzle of balsamic glaze or a sprinkle of everything bagel seasoning. You can also add a poached egg on top for extra protein. This fresh, vibrant dish brings the taste of California straight to your table in under 10 minutes.
